module RefModule(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input enable,
  output reg out
);always @(posedge clk, posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
      out <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
      out <= 1;
    end else begin
      out <= 0;
    end
  end
  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
